name: Dune
description_short: On-chain data analysis with community dashboards.
description_long: Dune is a powerful tool for blockchain research, providing instant on-chain data analysis and community-driven dashboards for the Cardano ecosystem.

products.name: Dune Analytics Studio
products.description: Web-based SQL editor and dashboard builder for querying and visualizing on-chain data across 100+ blockchains.

products.name: Dune API
products.description: API for automated on-chain data extraction and integration into external applications.

products.name: DataShare
products.description: Export on-chain blockchain data directly to Snowflake, BigQuery, or Databricks.
